mnemonics.title: Production Rules
mnemonics.content: Type 3: Strictly Linear, Type 2: Single Non-Terminal, Type 1: Context Wrap, Type 0: Anything Goes

acronyms.usage: Remember hierarchy levels 0-3 by associated automata power

visualTips.visualization: Russian nesting dolls with Type-3 inside Type-2 inside Type-1 inside Type-0

analogies.analogy: School system: Type 3=Preschool (simple rules), Type 2=Elementary (structured), Type 1=High School (context-aware), Type 0=University (unrestricted)
